questionHtml: Suggest how a plastic bag placed around the plant pot prevents carbon dioxide from reaching the plant’s leaves.
markschemeHtml:
a. to prevent CO2 from (organisms in) the soil affecting the experiment;

b. the plastic bag is impermeable to gases;

meta.title: Suggest how a plastic bag placed around the plant pot prevents carbon dioxide from reaching the plant’s leaves.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.3.7. Techniques for varying concentrations of carbon dioxide, light intensity or temperature experimentally to investigate the effects of limiting factors on the rate of photosynthesis
